title: Chinese Buddhist: Bao Lin Zhuan (Treasure Forest) (3)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Bao Lin Zhuan (Treasure Forest)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Bao Lin Zhuan (Treasure Forest)

translation.text: From Bao Lin Zhuan (Treasure Forest): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
